name: Savory Supper Patties
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked ground beef OR other roast leftovers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cooked beef or roast, minced onion, sage, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
2. Add the eggs and mix until well combined.
3. Gradually add the mashed potatoes, mixing until all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Form the mixture into patties.
5. Roll each patty in flour to coat evenly.
6. Heat a skillet over medium heat.
7. Brown the patties in hot fat for about 3-4 minutes on each side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 160°F (71°C).
8. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
